The Problem

This is how QC
fails on most
sites today.

Most construction teams in Uganda and East Africa manage quality control using WhatsApp groups, printed forms, and Excel sheets. When something goes wrong — and it always does — the documentation is missing, the audit trail is gone, and there's no one to hold accountable.

QCDesk fixes that. From day one. Even if you've never run a formal QC system before.
01
Inspections on WhatsApp
Photos sent at midnight, no reference numbers, no timestamps. When the client or regulator asks for proof, there is none.
QCDesk logs every inspection with reference, timestamp and status
02
Paper forms that disappear
Rain, mud, misfiled boxes. When a dispute arises months later, the signed forms are nowhere to be found.
Every form stored digitally, searchable, PDF-exportable on demand
03
No ITP? No workflow? No problem.
Even if your team has never used a formal QC system, QCDesk walks you through the right process. The structure is built in.
Built-in templates, step-by-step workflows, guided checklists
04
Material arrives damaged — no record
A delivery comes in with damaged packaging. Nobody documented it properly. Now you can't raise an OSD claim. Revenue lost.
Document every delivery with condition, docs received — instant OSD evidence

Your site.
Your QC.

Modelled from real construction workflows — not software adapted from somewhere else.

The Platform

Everything your
QC team needs.
In one place.

Inspections

Request for Inspection.
The right way.

Raise an RFI the proper way — discipline, area, ITP reference, scheduled time. Set Hold, Witness, Review, Monitor intervention points for contractor and client. Even if your team has never done this before, QCDesk guides them through each step.

3-stage workflow H/W/R/M intervention points Auto reference numbers Timestamped audit trail ITP linkage
qcdesk.vercel.app — RFI
Non-Conformance

NCR Tracker.
Open to closed.

Every Non-Conformance gets logged, classified, and tracked to closure. Filter by severity, status, and trade. Auto-raised when a checklist item fails, or raise manually. Nothing falls through the cracks.

Open → Under Review → Closed Minor / Major / Critical severity Electrical / Civil / Mechanical Auto-raised from failed items
qcdesk.vercel.app — NCRs
Material Receiving

Document every
delivery. Every time.

When materials arrive, document everything instantly — supplier, PO number, delivery note, packaging condition, and every document received. If something arrives damaged, you have the proof to raise an OSD claim on the spot. No arguments. No guessing.

Intact / Damaged condition Certificate of Conformance Test Reports & IRC Instant OSD evidence Auto MRR numbering
qcdesk.vercel.app — Materials

Where QCDesk Came From

Built by someone who lived
the problem.

QCDesk wasn't designed in a boardroom. It was designed on site — at pump stations, substations, and construction compounds across East Africa, where QC paperwork disappeared into WhatsApp groups, NCRs got disputed because there was no timestamp, and ITPs existed as PDFs no one could find when it mattered.

The founder is an Electrical Engineer with 12 years of QC experience across power distribution, MEP, and major infrastructure projects. She has supervised teams of 150+, built QA dashboards from scratch, and seen firsthand what happens when quality documentation fails — on projects where the consequences are not just delays, but safety.

QCDesk is what she needed and couldn't find. Now she's building it for every QC engineer, site manager, and contractor who is still fighting the same battle with paper and shared drives.

12 YEARS. THE NUMBERS.
150+
Technicians supervised
30%
Energy loss reduction achieved
40%
Rework reduction on CMIMS
100%
NCR closure rate maintained
Pricing

Per project.
Not per month.

QC work is project-based. Your software cost should be too. Pay once per project — no subscriptions, no per-seat fees, no surprise invoices mid-construction.
